steps.title: Use the comparison
steps.content: The underlined portion compares eye tracking in dreams with eye tracking by awake sighted people. That similarity supports the team's conclusion about how the brain perceives dream objects.

steps.title: State the support function
steps.content: Choice A invents an initial hypothesis, Choice B invents a change in study focus, and Choice C treats the finding as a real-world implication. The underlined portion identifies a comparable circumstance that supports the conclusion. The answer is D.
